type_error_policy: pygame.image.frombuffer is a Python third-party adapter. Cairoon exposes the underlying retained ImageData and copied Bytes operations with typed dimensions; pygame object and format-string validation do not enter the MoonBit API.

runtime: src/tests/image/data/image_data_test.mbt::pycairo image surface get_data mutable view fixture
static_api: pub fn Surface::get_data(Self) -> ImageData raise CairoError
pub fn ImageData::copy(Self) -> Bytes raise CairoError
test_image_surface_to_pygame_image.decision: | Python buffer protocol / NumPy / pygame adapters | Decision |
test_image_surface_to_pygame_image.adaptation: The Python-specific pygame Surface conversion is outside cairoon's runtime API. ImageData retention plus deterministic native BGRA byte order provide the data needed by a separately designed MoonBit graphics adapter without exposing a dangling pointer.
